headline: Session truth, franchise intent, observed learning, and career direction now form one explicit architecture.

items.title: Self-validating session authority
items.evidence: Freshness joins age, coherence, closeout and rendered-session identity; all known PROJECT_STATUS mutations use the invariant writer.

items.title: Architect's Ledger
items.evidence: Successful controlled weekly transactions persist intent, exact execution, observed outcome/alignment, and a non-causal next adaptation.

items.title: Three-Horizon Blueprint
items.evidence: Now, Season, and Legacy share live authorities, actionable destinations, responsive parity, and honest missing states.

items.title: Real ContractService seam
items.evidence: GameSession delegates exact cap-ledger accounting without response-shape or snapshot drift.

items.title: Universal proprietary Studio footer
items.evidence: All 11 public routes enforce exact copyright plus a valid HTTPS VaultSpark Studios link-back.

items.title: Second-order learning loop
items.evidence: Latest adaptation informs the next horizon; bounded tactic consistency/alignment remains sample-labeled and explicitly non-causal.

followUps.title: Fresh next arc
followUps.evidence: Primary and viable second-order queues are exhausted; begin a new live-code audit unless external release evidence changes.

blockers.title: Hosted release evidence family
blockers.evidence: Staging is 3/10; canonical health/headers, received email, approval, and registry reconciliation remain absent.

honestyLedger.title: No causal performance claim
honestyLedger.evidence: Decision-memory output describes declared consistency and observed alignment only.

honestyLedger.title: No phantom staging
honestyLedger.evidence: Local Pages/browser success was not substituted for hosted deploy identity.

honestyLedger.title: No sibling edit
honestyLedger.evidence: Registry and host truth remain transported through Studio Ark.
